summary.en: Tencent's AI model with strong Chinese capabilities and Tencent ecosystem integration.
summary.zh: 腾讯的 AI 模型，具备强大的中文能力和腾讯生态集成。

title.en: Tencent Hunyuan API Key - Tencent Ecosystem AI | Get Model Key
title.zh: 腾讯混元 API Key - 腾讯生态 AI | Get Model Key

description.en: Get Tencent Hunyuan API key for Chinese AI models. Access Hunyuan series with Tencent ecosystem integration.
description.zh: 获取腾讯混元 API Key，访问中文 AI 模型。使用混元系列，集成腾讯生态能力。

benefit.en: Hunyuan-related offers can reach around 1M tokens, with common validity up to about 1 year (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 混元相关活动通常可到约 100 万 Token，常见有效期约 1 年（以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: The longer validity window is attractive, and everyday Chinese understanding plus dialogue stability is generally solid.
notes.zh: 可用周期相对更长，中文理解与日常对话的稳定性表现不错。
